title: Hit
description: Retrieve the number of hits you have used for the running month and the total capacity allocated to your current subscription plan.

capacity.description: Included supplies in the plan you’re subscribed to.

used.description: Supplies created during the running month. Additional requests beyond `capacity` will be charged according to the plan you’re subscribed to.

capacity.description: Included validations in the plan you’re subscribed to.

used.description: Validations created during the running month. Additional requests beyond `capacity` will be charged according to the plan you’re subscribed to.
